content.rendered:
The Travel Money Service That Chooses Your Destination (So You Don’t Have To)

Because choosing a holiday is… exhausting

Let’s be honest.

Planning a holiday in 2026 isn’t exciting anymore… it’s a full-time job.

You start with a simple idea:
“I just want a nice break.”

Three hours later, you’ve got 47 tabs open, you’re comparing humidity levels in six countries, and somehow you’re deep into a forum about “the price of a breakfast”.

At this point, you don’t need a holiday.
You need someone to make a decision for you.

So… we did exactly that.

Introducing: Pick My Holiday ✈️💸

The service where your travel money decides where you go

No more overthinking.
No more comparing.
No more “just one more quick search”.

With Pick My Holiday, you simply order your travel money…
…and let fate do the rest.

We send you a mystery envelope of foreign currency.
You open it.

That’s your destination.

No take-backs. No swaps. No Googling “alternative options”.

How it works (brace yourself)

Choose your level of chaos:

🌍 The “Play It Safe-ish” Package

You’ll receive a European currency.
Could be euros. Could be Swiss francs. Could be Hungarian forint.

You’re going somewhere… vaguely familiar.

✈️ The “Why Not?” Package

Long-haul currencies only.
Think Japanese yen, Mexican pesos, Australian dollars.

Jet lag included. Emotional preparedness not included.

🎲 The “Absolutely Unhinged” Package

Anything. Anywhere. No rules.

You could be sipping cocktails in Barbados…
…or Googling “what to do in a snowstorm with no WiFi”.

Real-life scenarios (probably)

  • You wanted a beach break… you got Iceland.
  • You packed flip-flops… hello Polish winter.
  • You booked two weeks off… turns out you need a visa, three vaccines, and a mild sense of bravery.

But hey… you didn’t have to decide.

Why we… quietly didn’t launch it

As much as we love the idea of chaos… our customers don’t.

Turns out:

  • People like to know where they’re going
  • Visas are a thing
  • Not everyone wants to accidentally book a hiking trip in the Alps
  • And “surprise!” doesn’t land well when you’ve got kids, budgets, or knees

Who knew?

If you do want a bit of spontaneity…

We’ve got slightly less reckless ideas:

✔ Pick 3 destinations you actually like… then flip a coin
✔ Book the trip, but don’t plan every second
✔ Say yes to things when you get there (within reason… we’re still British)

You still get the excitement.
Just without the logistical nightmare.

What Travel FX actually does (sadly less chaotic)

No mystery envelopes.
No accidental mountain expeditions.
No emotional damage.

Just:

  • Competitive exchange rates
  • Over 50 currencies
  • Home delivery or click & collect
  • Easy buyback on leftover currency

You choose the destination.
We make sure you’ve got the right money for it.

Final thought

“Pick My Holiday” might not be real…
…but the struggle of choosing where to go definitely is.

So go on, book the trip you actually want.

And when you’re ready…

Travel FX will sort the travel money (no surprises, we promise!).

Happy April Fools from Travel FX 😉

@graph.name: Lucy Reed
@graph.description: Hi! I’m Lucy, as well as writing blog posts I lead Customer Experience and UX at Travel FX. With over 15 years’ experience in the foreign exchange industry, I specialise in helping UK travellers understand exchange rates, avoid unnecessary fees, and feel confident about their travel money before they fly. Having lived both in the UK and overseas, and travelled extensively over the years, I understand first-hand how important it is to get the details right when you’re planning a trip. From managing your travel budget to choosing the right foreign currency or travel money card, small decisions can make a big difference.
